controlMethod.description: 0 - control by ISO. 1 - control by luxIndex.

globalOB.description: global OB, black level value of 14bit raw data and rggb order.

localOBLut.description: local OB lut, black level value of 14bit raw data.

ShadingType.description: 0 - use common shading table, 1 - split shading table and only using chroma part, 2 - split shading table and using all parts.
